# Vectronomy

> Free, open-source online design studio for digital creators, makers, and fabricators. Vector editing, photo editing, SVG creation, image tracing, and fabrication-ready export for laser cutting, 3D printing, CNC, and vinyl cutting.

## What is Vectronomy?

Vectronomy is a free, open-source online design studio that runs entirely in your browser. It is built for digital creators, content creators, makers, and fabricators who need a complete design tool without downloads, accounts, or subscriptions.

Vectronomy combines a professional vector graphics editor, photo and image editing tools, SVG creation, image-to-vector tracing, XCS project conversion, and fabrication-ready export — all in one browser-based workspace. It is a free alternative to Adobe Illustrator, Inkscape, Figma, and Canva.

## Who is Vectronomy for?

- **Digital creators** — designers, illustrators, and artists creating vector artwork
- **Content creators** — YouTubers, streamers, and social media creators designing graphics and thumbnails
- **Makers** — hobbyists and professionals using laser cutters, 3D printers, CNC routers, and vinyl cutters
- **Fabricators** — engineers and machinists preparing production-ready vector files
- **Students and educators** — anyone learning design, fabrication, or vector graphics
- **Open source enthusiasts** — developers contributing to free design tools

## Photo & Image Editing

- Import PNG, JPEG, and other raster images
- Adjust brightness, contrast, and blur
- Image tracing — convert photos to editable vector paths
- Four tracing modes: Silhouette, Centerline, Edge Detection, Posterization
- Logo vectorization and photo tracing
- Overlay images on the vector canvas for reference

## Vector Drawing Tools

- **Bezier Pen Tool** — Create precise vector curves with anchor points and handles
- **Pencil Tool** — Freehand drawing with automatic path smoothing
- **Shape Tools** — Rectangle, circle, ellipse, polygon, star, spiral
- **Line Tools** — Line, polyline for precise straight segments
- **Brush & Eraser** — Variable-size brush and eraser with style options
- **Frame Tool** — Artboard management for multi-frame projects
- **Node Editor** — Direct manipulation of anchor points, handles, and path segments

## SVG Creation & Editing

- Create SVG files from scratch with drawing tools
- Edit existing SVG files — drag and drop to open
- Modify paths, strokes, fills, opacity, and colors
- Full layer management with grouping and z-order
- Export clean, standards-compliant SVG files

## Path Operations (Pathfinder)

- **Unite** — Merge multiple shapes into one
- **Subtract** — Cut one shape from another
- **Intersect** — Keep only the overlapping area
- **Exclude** — Remove the overlap and keep the rest
- **Divide** — Split shapes at intersection points
- **Path Flattening** — Convert curves to line segments
- **Path Reversal** — Reverse the direction of path segments

## Image Tracing — Raster to Vector

- **Silhouette Trace** — Convert images to black/white vector outlines
- **Centerline Trace** — Extract skeletal center paths from images
- **Edge Detection** — High-pass edge detection for outline extraction
- **Posterization** — Multi-color layered vector output from photographs

## XCS to SVG Conversion

- Convert xTool Creative Space (.xcs) project files to SVG
- Drag and drop XCS files to view and export all layers
- Compatible with all xTool laser cutter project files
- No xTool software installation required

## Laser Cutting, 3D Printing & CNC Fabrication Tools

- **Kerf Offset** — Compensate for laser beam width
- **Pocket Hatching** — Generate pocket clearing toolpaths
- **Chamfering** — Create chamfer/bevel toolpaths
- **Drill Conversion** — Convert circles to drill hole operations
- **Milling Tabs** — Add holding tabs for CNC milling
- **Concentric Hatching** — Generate concentric pocket clearing paths
- Compatible with: Lightburn, LaserGRBL, Glowforge, Epilog, Prusa, Cura, Cricut, Silhouette, and more

## Layer Management & Alignment

- Multi-layer workspace with named tabs
- Group and ungroup elements
- Lock layers to prevent editing
- Z-order controls (bring to front, send to back)
- Visual layer tree with color-coded groups
- Horizontal alignment: left, center, right
- Vertical alignment: top, middle, bottom
- Grid overlay with snap-to-grid
- Interactive rulers with mm and inch units
- Grid array creation for repeated patterns

## Export Formats

- **SVG** — Clean, standards-compliant scalable vector graphics
- **PNG** — High-resolution raster export at 2x
- **JPEG** — Compressed raster with white background
- **Source Text** — Raw SVG code as text file
- **Clipboard** — Copy SVG code directly
- **Multi-layer batch export** — Download all layers as separate SVG files

## Additional Features

- Full undo/redo with drawing-level history
- Dark mode and light mode with system theme detection
- Drag and drop file import (SVG, XCS, PNG, JPEG)
- Stroke and fill customization with color picker
- Opacity controls for stroke and fill
- Stroke cap and join settings
- Image brightness, contrast, and blur adjustment
- Interactive onboarding tours
- Keyboard shortcuts for every tool
- Custom hotkey mapping

## Pages

- `/` — Main Studio (design editor workspace)
- `/roadmap` — Product roadmap with 140 planned features across 10 divisions
- `/help` — Interactive help center with tutorials and keyboard shortcuts

## Technical Details

- Built with TypeScript and Vite
- Client-side only — all processing happens in the browser, no server uploads
- Works in all modern browsers with HTML5, Canvas, and SVG support
- Open source, MIT Licensed
- No account or registration required

## Use Cases

- Design and create vector graphics from scratch
- Edit and manipulate SVG files online
- Edit photos and images in the browser
- Trace raster images to vector (logos, artwork, photos)
- Create designs for laser cutting
- Prepare files for 3D printing
- Design CNC machining layouts
- Create vinyl cutter files for Cricut and Silhouette
- Convert xTool XCS project files to SVG
- Boolean pathfinder operations for complex shapes
- Create SVG icons, logos, and digital artwork
- Precision node editing for professional vector work
- Design fabrication-ready technical drawings

## Links

- Website: https://vectronomy.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/corned-dev/vectronomy
